title: FilesConnectSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the settings that modify the Files Connect feature.This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableContentHubAllowed.description: Indicates whether Files Connect is enabled (true) or not (false).

enableContentHubCvtLinksAllowed.description: Indicates whether the ability to link conversions in the feed publisher is enabled (true) or not (false) for Google Drive and Quip links.

enableContentHubEOSearchLayout.description: Indicates whether the external object’s search layout can be used in Global Search (true) or not (false).

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="FilesConnectSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="enableContentHubAllowed" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableContentHubCvtLinksAllowed" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableContentHubEOSearchLayout" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
